newProperties.name: iceberg_schema_case_insensitive
newProperties.description: Schema field name comparison mode when matching Redpanda's schema against the one returned by the Iceberg catalog. Some catalogs (e.g. AWS Glue) return field names with inconsistent casing, requiring case-insensitive comparison. "auto" enables case-insensitive comparison when the catalog is AWS Glue, and exact comparison otherwise.

newProperties.name: oidc_http_proxy_password
newProperties.description: Password for HTTP Basic authentication to the OIDC forward proxy (oidc_http_proxy_url). Leave unset for an unauthenticated proxy. Both username and password must be set for credentials to be sent.

newProperties.name: oidc_http_proxy_username
newProperties.description: Username for HTTP Basic authentication to the OIDC forward proxy (oidc_http_proxy_url). Leave unset for an unauthenticated proxy. Both username and password must be set for credentials to be sent.
